---
name: Feature Specification
about: Propose a new non-asset feature (renderer, exporter, pipeline tool, etc.)
title: ""
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

### Goal

> What does this feature do? What problem does it solve or what capability does it add?

### Motivation

> Why is this needed? What existing workflow is missing or broken without it?

### Interface

> How should users invoke this feature? CLI command, Python API, config option, etc.

```bash
# Example CLI usage
```

```python
# Example Python API usage (if applicable)
```

### Behavior

> Describe the expected behavior in detail. What inputs does it accept? What outputs does it produce? How should it handle edge cases or errors?

### Starter Code

> Is there any existing file, module, or stub that should be used as a starting point?

### Evaluation

> How do we verify this feature works correctly? What commands or tests should pass?

```bash
# Example test or verification command
```
